utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know they say a watched pot never beeps .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: It is just you know , been a couple of hours , and she has not called . Not that I even care , you know .

emotion_cause.span: 2_It is just you know , been a couple of hours , and she has not called .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe why do not you just call her ? You obviously want to .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You think you know me so well .

emotion_cause.span: 4_You think you know me so well .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , well I do know you .

emotion_cause.span: 12_She dumped me , I mean I totally trusted her and then one day it was Okay , bye Pheebs gone .

utterances.text: You know what the saddest part is , when we were playing together , that was like the most fun I have ever had in like all my lives .
